sections.subheading: Automate your entire growth funnel with AI. Let Fabrika handle the complexity while you focus on what matters. In minutes, not months.

items.title: Instant Setup, No Coding
items.description: No engineers needed. Deploy campaigns, landing pages, and automations in minutes using our AI-powered no-code platform.

items.title: AI-Powered Optimization
items.description: Machine learning that learns from your data and continuously improves performance 24/7. Your personal growth assistant.

items.title: Complete Visibility & Control
items.description: Real-time analytics, performance dashboards, and total control over every campaign. Know exactly what's working.

items.quote: We went from $50K/month to $250K/month in 6 months. Fabrika's automation saved us hiring 3 full-time team members. Game-changer.

items.quote: The learning curve? Non-existent. We had our first campaign live in 30 minutes. The results came immediately after.
items.author: Emma Thompson

items.quote: Finally, a platform built for founders who want to stay lean. Fabrika gave us enterprise-grade tools without the enterprise overhead.

sections.heading: Ready to Automate Your Growth?
sections.description: Join the brands that are scaling faster, spending less, and keeping their lean teams. Get started free today—no credit card required. Setup takes 5 minutes.

items.question: Do I need technical skills to use Fabrika?
items.answer: Not at all. Fabrika is built for non-technical founders and marketers. If you can use Google Sheets, you can use Fabrika. We handle all the complexity behind the scenes.

items.question: What if I only have a small budget?
items.answer: Fabrika works at any scale. Whether you're spending $500/month or $50K/month on ads, our platform optimizes your spend and maximizes efficiency. You only pay for what you use.

items.question: How fast will I see results?
items.answer: You'll see data within 24 hours. Real optimization kicks in by week 2. Most customers see 15-30% improvement in their first month. Some see results even faster.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. Enterprise-grade encryption, regular security audits, GDPR compliant, and your data stays in your control. We've never had a breach.

items.question: Can I integrate with my existing tools?
items.answer: Yes. Fabrika connects to Shopify, Stripe, Segment, Zapier, webhooks, and 500+ other tools via API. Custom integrations are available too.

items.question: What's the difference between Fabrika and other platforms?
items.answer: We focus on automation and AI-first optimization, not just analytics. Most tools show you problems; Fabrika solves them automatically. And we're built by founders, for founders.
